**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level 'new auto-making force' hallucination pulverization and the '1-person street-side car wash/used car repair shop' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Jinzhong Automotive Technology,' serves as perhaps the most darkly humorous case in this data cleansing. Because its name includes 'Automotive Technology' and its license states 'new energy vehicle complete car sales, auto parts R&D,' the official big data system, with supreme confidence and absurdity, categorized it into the highest echelon of heavy industry: 'Complete Auto Manufacturing'! However, the forensic logic engine directly stripped off the emperor's new clothes of this 'new auto-making force': its paid-in capital is only 1.02 million RMB! Even more unbelievably, the entire company's insured headcount is a staggering 1 person! The logical deduction instantly transforms into extremely vivid street-level realism: in a street-side storefront on Chengxin Avenue, the boss (the sole insured person), wearing coveralls and holding just over 1 million RMB, claims to have built a 'Complete Auto Manufacturing Plant' requiring tens of billions in capital and featuring all four major processes—stamping, welding, painting, and final assembly? The probe mercilessly deleted the system-bestowed 'auto-making' myth, extracting the truly grounded business from the latter half of its license: 'used car dealership/brokerage/evaluation; motor vehicle repair and maintenance; car wash services; auto towing, rescue.' The truth is starkly naked and smells of gasoline: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee Auto Repair Shop, Car Wash & Used Car Dealer. The owner is highly likely an experienced auto mechanic who rented a storefront, usually washing cars and fixing cars for others (motor vehicle repair and maintenance), and towing vehicles when they break down (rescue and clearance). With some spare cash, they flip used cars or new energy commuter vehicles (used car dealership/complete car sales). The official 'Complete Auto Manufacturing' tag represents the most egregious dimensional mismatch for this most fundamental street-level automotive service shop.
